title: Women like you are\nalready seeing results
r1Text: My protein went from 48g to 102g daily. Hair stopped falling after 3 weeks. This app changed my GLP-1 experience.
r2Text: I almost quit Mounjaro due to nausea. FoodZee showed which foods to avoid — nausea disappeared completely.
r3Text: Stopped GLP-1 6 months ago and haven't gained a pound. FoodZee taught me to eat right — for good.
